claim_text: Increase winter wheat seeding rate to ~28 pure-live seeds per square foot under dry conditions or late planting

value.raw_value_text: Increase seeding rate to approximately 28 pure-live seeds per square foot under dry conditions to account for poor seedling germination and seed mortality.
